evals.prompt: Write an ML experiment report. We tried fine-tuning BERT for sentiment analysis. It achieved 92% accuracy, beating the baseline TF-IDF model (85%). The main issue was it took 3x longer to infer.
expectations: Includes sections for Hypothesis, Setup, Results, and Analysis
Documents the baseline (TF-IDF 85%) and the new model (BERT 92%)
Highlights the trade-off in inference time
Provides a conclusion or recommendation on whether to deploy

evals.prompt: Document a failed experiment where adding data augmentation (back-translation) to our NER model actually decreased F1 score from 0.88 to 0.84. We suspect the translation introduced noise.
evals.expected_output: Experiment report detailing a negative result.
expectations: Clearly states the hypothesis and that it was disproved
Documents the metrics (0.88 baseline vs 0.84 new)
Includes an error analysis section suggesting translation noise as the root cause
Recommends abandoning this specific augmentation approach
